transcript: You ordered a turtle bowel, mister.
Are you that same sick fuckin' person? Go home, bud. Take a nap and wake up.
I say go home and go to bed until you wake up into the world.
How would you like a 12-gauge in yo' head?
How would you like one up your ass?
[laughs] C'mon, don't be silly, boy. Just cut it out, hang up, and go to bed.
You'll be all right... You'll be all right come morning.
You ordered a turtle bowel, mister.
You... Your turtle shit... Stick it up your ass.
How would you like a tw--
Kinda... Kinda stupid, but fun, you know?
How would you like a 12-gauge in yo' head?
[laughs] It might feel good to you.
